title: Die Heiden von Kummerow und ihre lustigen Streiche
writer: Kurt Hahne, Eberhard Keindorff, Johanna Sibelius
actors: Paul Dahlke, Ralf Wolter, Fritz Tillmann
plot: Children reviving an old heathen ritual by standing in the frigid waters of the Baltic Sea; the one standing in the longest shall be referred to as the king of Kummerow.
